# Discussions setup

This repo has GitHub Discussions enabled with the following categories:

- **📣 Announcements** — Releases, important updates (maintainers only)
- **💡 Ideas** — Feature requests, design discussions
- **🙋 Q&A** — Usage questions, troubleshooting
- **🐛 Show and tell** — Projects built with loghop, scripts, integrations
- **🗳️ Polls** — Quick votes on roadmap questions

## How to use Discussions

- **Question about usage?** → Q&A category
- **Feature request?** → Ideas category
- **Built something with loghop?** → Show and tell
- **Found a bug?** → Open an issue (not a discussion)

Discussions are great for community engagement. They show that the
project is alive, that maintainers are responsive, and that other
people are using the tool.
